debug_info.goal:
case succ
m✝ m : ℕ
ih :
  ∀ {S : SimplicialComplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ)} {c : (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 1)},
    S.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1)) →
      S.faces.Finite →
        ∀ (hc : Geometry.IsSpernerColoring m S c), Odd {s | s ∈ S.faces ∧ Geometry.IsPanchromatic m (m + 1) c s}.ncard
S : SimplicialComplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1 + 1) → ℝ)
c : (Fin (m + 1 + 1) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 1 + 1)
hSspace : S.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1 + 1))
hSfin : S.faces.Finite
hc : Geometry.IsSpernerColoring (m + 1) S c
⊢ Odd {s | s ∈ S.faces ∧ Geometry.IsPanchromatic (m + 1) (m + 1 + 1) c s}.ncard

failed_attempts:
let f : (Fin (m + 2) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 2) := c
    let P := {s ∈ S.faces | IsPanchromatic f s}
    let B := {s ∈ S.faces | s.card = m + 1 ∧ SurjOn f s (univ.remove (Fin.last (m + 1)))}
    let β (s : Finset (Fin (m + 2) → ℝ)) := {t ∈ B | t ⊆ s}.ncard
    have h_β (s : Finset (Fin (m + 2) → ℝ)) (hs : s ∈ S.faces) : hs.card = m + 2 → (Odd (β s) ↔ s ∈ P) := by
      intro h_card
      let s_colors := s.image f
      have h_sub : s_colors ⊆ univ := subset_univ _
      have h_card_s : s.card = m + 2 := h_card
      by_cases hP : s ∈ P
      · have : s_colors = univ := (IsPanchromatic.surjOn hP).image_eq
        have : β s = 1 := sorry -- Exactly one face missing the color last (m+1)
        simp [hP, this]
      · have : s_colors ⊂ univ := sorry -- Missing at least one color
        have : β s = 0 ∨ β s = 2 := sorry -- Non-panchromatic implies zero or two such faces
        simp [hP, this]
    have : Odd (∑ s ∈ S.faces.filter (·.card = m + 2), β s) := sorry -- By handshaking lemma and induction ih
    exact sorry -- Relate the sum to Odd P.ncard using h_β

let K := S.facet (Fin.last (m + 1))
    have hKspace : K.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1)) := by
      rw [S.space_facet (Fin.last (m + 1)), hSspace, stdSimplex_facet_last]
    have hKfin : K.faces.Finite := hSfin.facet (Fin.last (m + 1))
    have hih := ih hKspace hKfin hc.facet_last
    rwa [Nat.odd_iff, S.ncard_panchromatic_succ_mod_two hSfin hc, ← Nat.odd_iff]

rw [S.ncard_panchromatic_simplices_odd_iff_ncard_boundary_panchromatic_simplices_odd hSfin hc]
    exact ih (S.boundary_complex_space m succ_nth_none_surjective hSspace hSfin)
      (S.boundary_complex_faces_finite m succ_nth_none_surjective hSfin)
      (S.boundary_coloring_is_sperner m succ_nth_none_surjective hSspace hSfin hc)

let S' : SimplicialComplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) := S.boundaryFacet (Fin.last (m + 1))
    let c' : (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 1) := fun x => (c (Fin.castSucc ∘ x)).castPred
      (hc (S.vertices_subset_space (S.mem_faces_of_mem_vertices _)) (by simp))
    have hS'space : S'.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1)) := by
      rw [S.space_boundaryFacet (Fin.last (m + 1)), hSspace, stdSimplex_facet (Fin.last (m + 1))]
    have hS'fin : S'.faces.Finite := hSfin.subset (S.boundaryFacet_faces_subset _)
    have hc' : IsSpernerColoring S' c' := fun x i hx hxi => by
      rw [Fin.castPred_castSucc] at *
      exact hc (S.vertices_boundaryFacet_subset _ hx) (by simp [hxi])
    have hOdd := ih hS'space hS'fin hc'
    let F := {s ∈ S.faces | s.card = m + 1 ∧ s.image c = Set.range (Fin.castSucc : Fin (m + 1) → Fin (m + 2))}
    let T := {s ∈ S.faces | s.card = m + 2}
    have h_double : (∑ t in T.toFinite.toFinset, (F.toFinite.toFinset.filter (· ⊆ t)).card) =
        (∑ f in F.toFinite.toFinset, (T.toFinite.toFinset.filter (f ⊆ ·)).card) := Finset.sum_card_inter_expected_eq_sum_card_inter_expected (fun _ _ => 1)
    have h_T : ∀ t ∈ T, (F.toFinite.toFinset.filter (· ⊆ t)).card = if IsPanchromatic c t then 1 else if (t.image c : Set (Fin (m + 2))) = Set.range Fin.castSucc then 2 else 0 := S.card_faces_with_color_set c
    have h_F : ∀ f ∈ F, (T.toFinite.toFinset.filter (f ⊆ ·)).card = if f.image (fun x => x (Fin.last (m + 1))) = {0} then 1 else 2 := S.card_simplices_containing_face_with_color_set c hc
    rw [← Nat.odd_iff_not_even, ← Nat.even_sum_iff_even_card_odd_terms, h_double]
    simp_rw [h_T, h_F, Finset.sum_ite, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero, ← Nat.even_sum_iff_even_card_odd_terms]
    convert hOdd using 2
    · rw [← Nat.even_add_self (Finset.filter (fun t => ¬IsPanchromatic c t ∧ t.image c = Set.range Fin.castSucc) T.toFinite.toFinset).card]
      exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
    · rw [← Nat.even_add_self (Finset.filter (fun f => f.image (fun x => x (Fin.last (m + 1))) ≠ {0}) F.toFinite.toFinset).card]
      convert Nat.even_zero; rw [add_zero, ← ncard_boundaryFacet_panchromatic S c]; rfl

    simpa [S.ncard_panchromatic_mod_two i hSfin] using

let i : Fin (m + 2) := m + 1

    let S' := S.boundaryFacet i

let iso := Fin.castSucc (n := m + 1)

    exact ih hTspace hTfin hTc

    let g : (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 1) := fun x ↦ (c (f.extend 0 x)).castPred

let S' : SimplicialComplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) := S.boundaryFacet (Fin.last (m + 1))
    let c' : (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) → Fin (m + 1) := fun x ↦
      (c (S.boundaryFacetEquiv (Fin.last (m + 1)) x)).castPred
        (hc (S.boundaryFacetVertices (Fin.last (m + 1)) (S.boundaryFacetEquiv_mem (Fin.last (m + 1)) x))
          (S.boundaryFacetEquiv_apply_last (Fin.last (m + 1)) x))
    have hS'space : S'.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1)) := S.boundaryFacet_space hSspace
    have hS'fin : S'.faces.Finite := S.boundaryFacet_finite hSfin
    have hc' : IsSpernerColoring S' c' := S.boundaryFacet_isSpernerColoring hc
    specialize ih hS'space hS'fin hc'
    exact (S.odd_panchromatic_iff_odd_boundary_facet (Fin.last (m + 1)) hc).mpr ih

let f : (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) ↪ (Fin (m + 2) → ℝ) := ⟨Fin.insertNth (m + 1) 0, Fin.insertNth_injective _ _⟩
    let fS : SimplicialComplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1) → ℝ) :=
      { faces := {s | f '' s ∈ S.faces},
        not_empty_mem_faces := λ s hs ↦ (S.nonempty_of_mem_faces hs).image _,
        downward_closed := λ s t hst ht ↦ S.downward_closed ht (image_subset f hst),
        inter_faces := λ s t hs ht ↦ by rw [← image_inter f.injective]; exact S.inter_faces hs ht }
    have hS' : fS.space = stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 1)) := by
      rw [SimplicialComplex.space, Set.ext_iff]
      intro x; constructor
      · rintro ⟨s, hs, hx⟩
        have : f x ∈ S.space := by rw [hSspace]; exact ⟨s, hs, hx⟩.image f
        simpa [stdSimplex, f] using this
      · intro hx
        have : f x ∈ stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 2)) := by simpa [stdSimplex, f] using hx
        rw [← hSspace] at this
        obtain ⟨s, hs, hys⟩ := this
        have hsf : s ⊆ range f := by
          intro y hy; obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := (stdSimplex ℝ (Fin (m + 2))).2 y (S.vertices_subset hs hy)
          by_contra h; have := hc (S.vertices_subset hs hy) (by simpa [f] using h)
          simpa [hi] using this
        obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := subset_range_iff_exists_image_eq.1 hsf
        exact ⟨t, ht.2 ▸ hs, ht.2 ▸ f.injective.image_mem_iff.1 hys⟩
    have hS'f : fS.faces.Finite := hSfin.preimage (f.image_injective.injOn _)
    have hS'c : IsSpernerColoring fS (c ∘ f) := λ x i hx hi ↦
      hc (S.vertices_subset hx (mem_image_of_mem f (mem_univ _))) (by simpa using hi)
    exact (odd_ncard_panchromatic_iff_odd_ncard_boundary_panchromatic hc hSspace hSfin).mpr $ by
      convert ih hS' hS'f hS'c; ext s; simp [IsPanchromatic, f, Set.SurjOn, univ_subset_iff]

refine (odd_ncard_panchromatic_iff_odd_ncard_boundary_panchromatic hSfin).mpr ?_
    rw [ncard_boundary_panchromatic_iff_ncard_facets_panchromatic hSspace hSfin hc]
    convert ih (S.space_facets_stdSimplex hSspace (Fin.last _)) (hSfin.subset <| S.facets_subset _)
      (hc.restrict_facets hSspace (Fin.last _))
    ext s
    simp [IsPanchromatic, hc.surjOn_facets_stdSimplex_iff hSspace (Fin.last _)]
hc'
